Epic: Enhance User Authentication and Account Management
Story Title: As a new user, I want to easily create an account with a clear and concise registration form.
User Story: As a new user, I want to fill out the registration form with minimal required fields, so that I can quickly create an account and start using Facebook.
Acceptance Criteria: Form fields are clearly labeled and easy to understand.; The registration process completes within 30 seconds.

Epic: Enhance User Authentication and Account Management
Story Title: As a registered user, I want to securely reset my password if I forget it.
User Story: As a registered user, I want to be able to easily reset my password through a secure process, so that I can regain access to my account if I forget it.
Acceptance Criteria: Password reset link is sent to the user's email address.; Password reset process is completed within 5 minutes.

Epic: Improve Content Sharing and Social Integration
Story Title: As a content creator, I want to quickly share my posts to Facebook and Instagram.
User Story: As a content creator, I want to use a simple share button to quickly share my posts to Facebook and Instagram, so that I can reach a wider audience.
Acceptance Criteria: Share button is clearly visible on all content.; Share button opens the correct sharing options.

Epic: Improve Content Sharing and Social Integration
Story Title: As a user, I want to easily follow other users on Facebook.
User Story: As a user, I want to be able to easily follow other users on Facebook, so that I can stay updated on their posts and activities.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can easily add users to their follow list.; Follow button is clearly visible on user profiles.
